description:
You are a Compliance Officer at a global manufacturing firm. The automated international trade screening API is offline, and you have a backlog of orders that must be screened manually against the US Treasury's Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) list to prevent export control violations. Using the 'Trade Compliance' database (User: compliance_officer, Password: Trade2024, Service: XEPDB1), identify pending orders where the ERP_CUSTOMERS.customer_name matches either the OFAC_SDN.sdn_name or an alias in OFAC_ALT.alt_name. 

A match is defined by a Jaro-Winkler similarity score of 88 or higher using case-insensitive comparison. Create a view named HIGH_RISK_MATCHES_VW containing the columns: order_id, customer_name, matching_sanctioned_name (the specific SDN name or ALT alias that triggered the match), similarity_score, and match_type ('PRIMARY' or 'ALIAS'). Update the 'status' of all matching orders in the ERP_ORDERS table from 'PENDING' to 'COMPLIANCE_HOLD'. Export the contents of the HIGH_RISK_MATCHES_VW view to /home/ga/Documents/exports/compliance_holds.csv.
